title: To Make a Deal With Trump, Iran Wants Billions of Its Money Unfrozen
summary_full: The money has become a sticking point in talks, with Iran insisting that meaningful negotiations cannot begin without the funds’ release.
summary_public: The money has become a sticking point in talks, with Iran insisting that meaningful negotiations cannot begin without the funds’ release.
